questionHtml: Sea urchins are destroying the giant kelp alga (Macrocystis pyrifera) marine forests of South East Australia. Suggest a reason that sea urchins might be an invasive species in this environment.
markschemeHtml:
the sea urchins’ limiting factors in their original habitat are missing
OR
lack of (natural) predators for sea urchins
